tests.expected_output: All standard fields answered with clear labels. Workday-specific fields covered (DOCX resume note, session timeout warning, char limits). Salary field shows '$160K–$175K' (from user response)

Workday-specific tip about DOCX upload included
Session timeout warning (30 minutes) mentioned
No file written to disk — output is for copy-paste
Workday character limits (4,000 per role, 5,000 cover letter) referenced

Current Title: Principal Engineer

- Senior Engineer at WebCo (Jan 2016–Jan 2019): microservices, Kubernetes
context.narrative.md: Positioning: Staff-level engineer solving infrastructure problems at scale. Target: platform engineering at top-tier tech companies.
context.jd.md: Role: Staff Engineer, Platform. Requirements: 10+ years experience, distributed systems, Go, Kubernetes, technical leadership. Greenhouse application.

user_responses.short_answer_questions:
Tell us about a project you're proud of (500 chars)
Why TechGiant? (500 chars)

tests.expected_output: Standard fields answered. Greenhouse-specific short-answer questions answered with substantive responses under 500 chars each. Referral source flagged clearly. Greenhouse tips included (one-session submission, short answers scored).
assertions: Years of experience calculated as 10+ years (2016–present)
Short-answer 'project you're proud of' response is 500 characters or fewer
Short-answer 'Why TechGiant?' response is 500 characters or fewer and references TechGiant specifically
How did you hear field shows referral with Lin Zhang's name
Greenhouse tip about one-session submission included
Greenhouse note about short answers being scored included
Work authorization dropdown guidance (US Citizen / Green Card / Visa / Other) included
Output is printed for copy-paste, no file written
